_comment: Golden fixture: GitHub issue item envelope — a fetched issue from a repository issue stream.
_authority_boundary: Provider fact only. Not Source, SourceSnapshot, SourceEvidence, DecisionCandidate, Decision, ToolRequest, ExternalIngestEnvelope, or event-store authority.
title: Add health-check route for liveness probes
content: We need a GET /healthz endpoint returning 200 for Kubernetes liveness probes. The current service has no health signal and restarts are blind.
